posts.text: The Israelis bombed the Iranian gas fields without our permission. They knew it would drive up gas prices Americans have to pay, but they did it anyway. Because they never listen to anyone else, or care about anyone but themselves. With allies like this, you don't need enemies.

Joe Kent conveniently under investigation now. @TuckerCarlson potentially under investigation. We've moved on from the propaganda portion of our programming to outright oppression. National media will pretend it's a total coincidence that opponents of the war are being targeted.

Left-wing partisans love that poll, too. Because they can say that all Trump voters are hypocrites, they all love war, they were all lying. They want to be able to say they're in a cult. So, everyone saying they're disappointed in Trump is a mirage? None of them exist? Absurd.

I generally like @ForecasterEnten, but that segment on the biggest bullshit poll of all time was unacceptable - and disingenuous framing. An NBC poll asked people who still call themselves MAGA if they like Trump, and they all said yes. Of course!! That's circular logic. What he didn't tell you was that half of Republicans who no longer call themselves MAGA are against the war. 

Unfortunately, there's a reason for this framing. It's to encourage Trump - don't worry, MAGA hasn't broken with you!

And don't take a couple of days to check back in with Tel Aviv and have them workshop a new piece of propaganda. It's a very easy question. If you don't answer, everyone will know it's because you rather have American troops killed then your precious Israeli soldiers.

I asked Israeli ass kisser @benfergusonshow on @PiersUncensored if we should send American or Israeli troops, if we're going to use ground troops. As I expected, he refused to answer. So, @benshapiro @marklevinshow @LauraLoomer - American or Israeli ground troops?

Israel attacking Iran's oil fields is completely against our interests. Not only will it increase oil prices, something US has said many time we don't want, but it will also lead to Iran bombing oil fields of Gulf countries. Double the disaster. Israel is the worst "ally" ever.

You should ask every politician and media figure on X this question they are desperate to avoid - should we use American or Israeli ground troops? I guarantee you they won't answer, and might even call you an antisemite. They all assume Americans are expendable. Make them answer.

It's so telling that no one in Washignton is even discussing whether to use American or Israeli ground troops. It's just assumed that Israeli lives are too precious and that obviously it has to be Americans who die for this war. And then they tell us they don't work for Israel.

Democratic voters hate this war! Only 13% of Democrats have a positive view of Israel. But our politicians would much rather work for Israel than us. Democratic leadership hates its own voters. They choose their donors over their voters every time. They love Israel and hate us.

It's very curious that all the groups who organized protests against Trump earlier have not organized a single protest over this very unpopular war. Most of those so-called left-wing groups are actually controlled by Democratic leadership, who are obviously in favor of this war.

To add insult to injury, whenever we have legitimate critique of a foreign government that has committed a genocide and attacked seven of its neighbors, our own leaders attack us as antisemites and try to smear any American who dares to defy Israel. This is unbearable.

A clear majority of Americans are against Israel now. An overwhelming majority of our politicians and media are loyal to Israel. This is unsustainable. How long can our own media and politicians oppress us and force us to support a country we think is doing great damage to us?

There seems to be only one Democrat in Congress fighting against the Israeli lobby. Where are all other Democrats in middle of this horrific war pushed on us by Israel? Most of them are still working with these odious organizations who push bigotry against Muslims and Americans!


Ro Khanna (@RoKhanna)

When will @aipac & @ADL be merging? Greenblatt you've sucked up enough to Trump you can probably get the merger approved in this Administration.



— https://nitter.net/RoKhanna/status/203397

Israel First is in such a panic over Joe Kent resignation they're sending in Democrats like @RepMoskowitz to say how evil Kent is and how right Trump is. Kent dared to say obvious truth - that this war is for Israel. So, the uniparty Israel Firsters are uniting in attacking him.

Joe Kent, Director of National Counterterrorism for Trump resigned over the war. He said, “It is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.” Good to see there are still patriots left. Everyone criticizing him now works for Israel.

But don't worry, I know Jared is so moral that he wouldn't dream of jeopardizing American interests to make a buck, or a billion. He's so decent we probably don't need to check in on him. Just keep letting him do backroom deals for himself while we fight wars for other countries.

Hunter Biden was such an amateur. Making puny $5 million deals off his family name. Jared Kushner is telling him to hold his champagne. He's making $5 billion deals with the very countries he's negotiating with, on behalf of America. Biggest conflict of intrerest you can imagine.

I get that the polling is complicated, but in the online community this is what I hear non-stop. MAGA is dead. Trump killed it. Everyone is sick of our politicians bowing to a foreign country and being ordered around. People are choosing principles over personalities and parties.


CaseStudyQB (@CaseStudyQB)
